name: GraniteShares Platinum Trust
summary: PART I The purpose of the GraniteShares Platinum Trust (the Trust) is to own platinum transferred to the Trust in exchange for shares issued by the Trust (Shares). Each Share represents a fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The assets of the Trust consist solely of platinum bullion. The Trust was formed on January 11, 2018 when an initial deposit of platinum was made in exchange for the issuance of two Baskets (a Basket consists of 50,000 Shares). The sponsor ...
